Our corporate law practice provides comprehensive legal services to businesses of all sizes. From entity formation and governance to mergers and acquisitions, our attorneys help companies navigate the complex legal landscape.

Services Include

  • Mergers & Acquisitions
  • Corporate Governance
  • Securities Regulation
  • Joint Ventures & Strategic Alliances
  • Shareholder Disputes

When disputes arise, our litigation team provides aggressive yet strategic representation in state and federal courts. We have a proven track record of achieving favorable outcomes for our clients in complex commercial disputes.

Areas of Focus

  • Breach of Contract
  • Business Torts
  • Class Action Defense
  • Intellectual Property Disputes
  • Antitrust Litigation

Our real estate practice handles all aspects of commercial and residential real estate transactions. We represent developers, investors, lenders, and property owners in transactions across the country.

Services Include

  • Property Acquisitions & Sales
  • Real Estate Finance

We advise employers and employees on the full spectrum of employment law issues. Our team stays current on evolving regulations to provide practical, business-minded counsel.

body.processed:
Sterling & Associates represented a mid-market technology company facing a hostile takeover attempt. Our corporate team developed a comprehensive defense strategy that ultimately resulted in a negotiated merger at a 40% premium to the initial offer.

Challenge

Our client, a publicly traded software company, received an unsolicited acquisition offer significantly below market value. The acquiring company had already accumulated a substantial stake and was pressuring the board.

Approach

Our team implemented a multi-pronged defense strategy, including shareholder communications, regulatory filings, and identification of a white knight bidder.
body.summary: Sterling & Associates represented a mid-market technology company facing a hostile takeover attempt. Our corporate team developed a comprehensive defense strategy that ultimately resulted in a negotia

body.processed:
We successfully defended a Fortune 500 retail company against a nationwide class action alleging systematic wage and hour violations. The case involved over 10,000 potential class members and sought $500 million in damages.

Challenge

A group of current and former employees filed a class action alleging the company systematically misclassified workers and failed to pay overtime.

Approach

Our employment team conducted an exhaustive analysis of pay records, job descriptions, and company policies, ultimately defeating class certification.
body.summary: We successfully defended a Fortune 500 retail company against a nationwide class action alleging systematic wage and hour violations. The case involved over 10,000 potential class members and sought $

entity.title: Mixed-Use Development Transaction

body.processed:
Sterling & Associates guided a major real estate developer through the acquisition, financing, and development of a $350 million mixed-use project in downtown Manhattan, including navigating complex zoning requirements and public-private partnerships.

Challenge

The project required assembling multiple parcels, obtaining zoning variances, securing complex financing, and negotiating with city agencies for public infrastructure improvements.

Approach

Our real estate team coordinated with environmental counsel, land use specialists, and financial advisors to structure the transaction in phases.

entity.outcome: $350M development approved and financed in 8 months

entity.title: Sterling & Associates Opens New West Coast Office

body.processed:
Sterling & Associates is pleased to announce the opening of our new office in San Francisco, marking a significant expansion of our West Coast presence. The new office will be led by three partners and house a team of 15 attorneys specializing in technology and corporate law.

"This expansion reflects our commitment to serving our growing base of technology sector clients," said founding partner James Sterling. "San Francisco is the ideal location for us to deepen our relationships in the tech industry."

entity.title: Firm Recognized in U.S. News Best Law Firms 2026

body.processed:
Sterling & Associates has been named a Tier 1 firm in Corporate Law and Commercial Litigation by U.S. News & World Report in their 2026 Best Law Firms rankings. This recognition is based on client feedback, peer review, and analysis of the firm's legal expertise.

"We are honored by this recognition," said managing partner Sarah Chen. "It reflects the dedication and talent of our entire team."

entity.title: Firm Launches Pro Bono Immigration Initiative

body.processed:
Sterling & Associates has launched a new pro bono initiative to provide free legal representation to immigrants and asylum seekers. The program, led by associate Elizabeth Thompson, aims to assist at least 100 individuals in the first year.

"Access to legal representation should not depend on ability to pay," said Thompson. "Our attorneys have the skills and resources to make a real difference in people's lives."

body.processed:
Founded in 1990, Sterling & Associates Law has grown from a boutique practice to one of the region's most respected full-service law firms. With over 50 attorneys across three offices, we serve clients ranging from Fortune 500 corporations to individuals facing their most challenging legal matters.

Our Mission

To provide exceptional legal counsel with unwavering integrity, achieving the best possible results for our clients while maintaining the highest ethical standards.

Our Values

  • Excellence - We hold ourselves to the highest standard in every matter we handle.
  • Integrity - We are honest, ethical, and transparent in all our dealings.
  • Client Focus - Our clients' interests always come first.
  • Community - We are committed to giving back through pro bono work and civic engagement.
